text:
Popcorn (ポップコーン, Poppukōn) is the second OVA ending theme and the fifth ending theme overall of the Hunter × Hunter 1999 anime adaptation. It was sung by Mikuni Shimokawa. The song was originally released in her second studio album 392: Mikuni Shimokawa Best Selection on September 19 th , 2002. After being used in the anime, the single version of the song was released in her ninth single All the Way on June 18 th , 2003.
